title: Software Engineering Internships - Google Careers
selftext: Direct access to Google's internship portal. Applications for summer and off-season roles usually open 6-9 months in advance.

title: Full-Time Entry Level Software Engineer Roles - LinkedIn
selftext: A real-time list of full-time engineering positions for recent graduates across various industries.

title: Roadmap.sh: Interactive Engineering Career Paths
selftext: The gold standard for technical engineering guidance. Provides step-by-step visual paths for Frontend, Backend, and DevOps.

title: The Engineering Manager's Guide to Career Growth
selftext: Deep-dive career guidance from Charity Majors on navigating the 'Engineer/Manager Pendulum' and technical leadership.

title: NASA OSTEM Internships
selftext: Real-world engineering internships in aerospace, robotics, and data science directly through NASA's official portal.

title: Levels.fyi: Engineering Salary and Benefits Data
selftext: Critical tool for full-time job seekers to compare total compensation (salary, bonus, equity) across top tech firms.

title: AWS Builders Library: Engineering at Scale
selftext: Technical articles by Amazon engineers on how they build and operate software that serves millions of users.

title: Tech Interview Handbook
selftext: Free, high-quality career guidance for acing engineering interviews, curated by industry professionals.

title: Microsoft University Internship Program
selftext: Official application site for Microsoft's undergraduate and graduate engineering internship programs.

title: Indeed: Mechanical Engineering Full-Time Jobs
selftext: Direct search link for full-time mechanical engineering roles across multiple sectors including automotive and energy.

title: GitHub Explore: Trending Engineering Projects
selftext: A live feed of the most impactful open-source engineering projects. Great for technical skill-building.

title: The Pragmatic Engineer: Career Growth Newsletter
selftext: The #1 newsletter for software engineers, providing guidance on the tech market, hiring, and seniority levels.
